title.en: There are no superior domain ancestors who have...

content.en:
While the Peerless Domain Ancestor was thinking about the Third Dark Holy Land, the Realm Ancestor continued: "The birth of the Third Dark Holy Land was a battle between half-step Domain Ancestors at the beginning, although the level of the treasures born at the beginning would not be too high, but it was also a great opportunity. Therefore, which half-step domain ancestors to send in, the major forces have a quantitative standard. Each of you Peerless Domain Ancestors has 100,000 quotas, and you can send 100,000 half-step Domain Ancestors, or you can cultivate them yourself. And the benefits and opportunities obtained by these half-step domain ancestors, if you can control them in your hands, they are also your opportunities. After all, if you can't enter the Dark Holy Land, you can only rely on those half-step domain ancestors to snatch the opportunity!"

"Yes!"

There are no superior domain ancestors who have answered.

As for the 100 million years later, they can also send a certain number of top domain ancestors into it.

A trillion years, a realm year, is the opportunity for these unsuperior domain ancestors to appear.

"Let's go back and prepare, according to the calculations of our ancestors, there will be about 3 million years to go, and the third Dark Holy Land will be born!"

Jiezu reminded.

Subsequently, the Superior Domain Ancestors went back to prepare.

And the two ancestors of the Battle Gate also need to make some preparations for their future opportunity to compete for the third Dark Holy Land.

......

Xuanxu Holy Realm, human race.

Ye Tian immediately began to conduct a selection covering hundreds of millions of half-step domain ancestors in the human race, and the half-step domain ancestors in the countless human territory would pass one assessment after another, and select the half-step domain ancestors with the highest talent, the strongest combat power, and the highest potential.

For this battle, Ye Tian specially got a Battle Boundary Tower Projection Tower from the Battle Gate, which was only selected and used by the human race.

That's it.

The internal selection of the Terrans began.

Although many Terran Half-Step Domain Ancestors did not understand the significance of this selection, this was an order given by the strongest Terran and the founder of the rise of the Terran Race, Wanfa Zhan Ancestor, and it must be a real great opportunity.

Therefore, countless Terran half-step domain ancestors are crazy, and they have worked hard to cultivate for this selection, after all, this selection will take 3 million years, even if the current cultivation is a little lower, or even just break through to the half-step domain ancestor realm.

But as long as you perform well, you can get the rewards of the human race and quickly improve your cultivation.

In short, the selection rules set by Ye Tian will not miss a genius.

Soon, the million years will come to an end.

At this time, 100,000 Terran geniuses who had fought for millions of years were born.

What no one knew was that Ye Tian killed a Terran half-step domain ancestor who had committed a capital crime, killed that half-step domain ancestor, copied it into the other party's body, and then gave this body some ancestral gifts.

In this way, the talent of this body is still second only to the demonic talent of the main body, and the cultivation is in the half-step domain ancestor realm, and it has a high growth potential.

Moreover, Ye Tian spent a huge price for this body to reshape his body, and even transform it.

The most important thing is that the origin of this body can be found completely, and even the ancestors do not see any problems.

In this way, Ye Tian's copy body followed the ninety-nine thousand nine hundred and ninety-nine geniuses and entered the third Dark Holy Land not long after.

this day.

Xuanxu Holy Realm, in front of the Terran Temple.

One hundred thousand geniuses gathered here, and Ye Tian also appeared.

"I've seen Lord Wanfa Zhan Ancestor!"

One by one, the Terran geniuses said respectfully.

Ye Tian looked at the 100,000 human race genius and said, "You may be very curious, why I held such a selection competition, and even you guessed what kind of reward there would be. But, let me tell you, there are no rewards, only one big chance!"

Good luck?

100,000 geniuses are curious, what kind of opportunity has made the human race spend a lot of time and select millions of years?

"You should all know about the Dark Sacred Domain and the Dark Destruction Domain in the Terran Library Pavilion, and now the third Dark Holy Land in the Dark Forbidden Domain has been born, which is full of endless resources, and any treasure you can easily promote to a domain ancestor, if you get enough opportunities, there is hope for you to be promoted to a peerless domain ancestor in the future. "

Ye Tian said truthfully.

Rumble!!!!

100,000 days were excited.

What a great opportunity, I didn't expect them to be able to get it.

The opportunity to become a Superior Domain Ancestor is not available to the Xuanxu Saint Realm at all.

The entire human race, countless years have passed, and at present, there is only Ye Tian and a topless domain ancestor, and there are not many topless domain ancestors in the ten holy gates of the dark holy domain!

Once you become a Peerless Domain Ancestor, you can create a Holy Land-level force.

Ye Tian told some things, and at the same time reminded that this opportunity is also very dangerous, if you are not careful, it will fall, if you are afraid, you can quit.

However, no one withdrew.

If you quit, you may not be able to have such an opportunity again in the future.

For them, being able to raise their cultivation to a half-step domain ancestor, after cultivating for a long time, they have lived enough, their goal is the domain ancestor, it is a peerless domain ancestor, and now with such a great opportunity, where would they not go because they are afraid of death?

Time passed slowly, and tens of thousands of years passed.

this day.

The Realm Ancestor has reported that the third Dark Holy Land is about to be born, so that the major forces can prepare.

......

Deep in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

An area very far away from the Dark Sanctuary and the Dark Destruction Domain, a huge vortex was created here, this vortex far exceeded the area of a large realm, from not large at the beginning, to gradually covering an area comparable to the dark sanctuary.

At this time.

In the center of this vortex, worlds were born and continents evolved.

Countless realms were born one by one, and later, the first holy realm was born.

At the same time, these worlds also gave birth to a large number of innate beings, as well as primeval chaos gods and demons.

As for the forbidden creatures, they have not yet been born, after all, the forbidden creatures are comparable to the domain ancestors, so naturally they will not be born so soon, otherwise how can the ordinary creatures of this third world survive?

Abrupt.

A figure appeared here, and a huge space-time portal appeared behind him.

He is the space-time ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain.

Then, a golden giant tower appeared, and a person came out of the giant tower, who was the Realm Ancestor of the Battle Gate.

And not long after the Realm Ancestor arrived here, the Holy Ancestor also came here, and the Ancestor of Destruction also came.

In terms of speed, the Space-Time Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor were the fastest, but the strength was the most powerful of the Saint Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor.

An Ancestor arrived and looked at the third Dark Sanctuary.

"What a familiar scene!"

The Ancestor of Destruction grinned, a cruel grin.

If he could, he would even want to destroy all living beings here and transform it into a second Destruction Domain.

It's a pity that he can't do it now, and even if he can, these cultivators in the Dark Sanctuary will inevitably stop him.
